name: Ganesh Kalal
kicker: Melbourne, VIC • Demolition • Remediation • Civil Works
heroTitle: I deliver complex demolition & civil works — safely, compliantly, and on program.
heroSubtitle: Project Engineer with strong site delivery experience across demolition, remediation and civil infrastructure. I coordinate subcontractors, manage QA/QC systems, and work with authorities to achieve safe outcomes in live environments.
signatureLine: “I like structured planning, clean QA, and calm site control — even on high-risk jobs.”
aboutLead: This page is written like a personal website — story-driven, clear, and easy to explore.
aboutStory: I’m a Project Engineer focused on demolition, remediation and civil delivery. I enjoy planning complicated work, building safe systems (SWMS, permits, traffic/pedestrian control), and running site execution with clear QA, communication and reporting. I work closely with subcontractors, consultants and authorities to deliver compliant outcomes in live environments.
knownFor: Structured planning and staged demolition sequencing
Strong documentation: SWMS, ITPs, inspections, close-out
Clear subcontractor coordination and site control
tools: ITPs, checklists, lot tracking, NCRs and close-out packs
Daily diaries, progress reporting, RFIs and variations
Permits, exclusion zones, traffic and pedestrian management
Waste tracking and compliant disposal documentation

bento.title: How I run a site
bento.preview: I keep site control calm: plan → brief → execute → inspect → close out.
bento.fullText: My site approach is simple and repeatable: define hazards and controls, lock in a realistic sequence, brief crews clearly, keep QA records tight, and close out every task properly.
bullets: Clear exclusion zones and access control
QA checks built into the sequence

bento.title: Safety & compliance
bento.preview: I prioritise hazard control, permits and clear communication in live environments.
bento.fullText: Demolition and remediation require disciplined control of hazards, permits and interfaces. I focus on practical controls and clear site rules so everyone goes home safe.

bento.title: QA/QC
bento.preview: I keep QA simple: ITP → check → record → close.
bento.fullText: Good QA is easy to follow. I keep ITPs practical, record inspections consistently and close NCRs quickly to avoid end-of-job panic.

projects.title: Staged demolition works (Sample)
projects.preview: Planned staged sequencing, managed subcontractors, and maintained safety and QA records.
projects.fullText: Delivered staged demolition with a focus on safe execution and minimal disruption. Coordinated crews, access, exclusions and documentation.
bullets: Sequenced demolition stages to manage risk and interfaces
Coordinated subcontractor trades and site access
Maintained SWMS, permits, prestarts and daily reporting
Managed waste separation and disposal documentation
Site delivery across demolition, remediation and civil works
